overall.description: First-person exploration through neon-lit cyberpunk city alleys at night, featuring dense urban architecture with Japanese and Korean signage, industrial scaffolding, and reflective wet surfaces. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk from narrow back alleys through an open plaza to a main street and into narrow commercial passages with outdoor seating.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cyberpunk alley, observing purple neon signs and industrial scaffolding on the right

rusted corrugated metal wall with graffiti
industrial metal scaffolding with green safety netting
network of pipes and conduits running overhead between buildings
blue neon sign reading SEX SHOP on the left wall
red illuminated sign with Korean text for restaurant

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, with the camera walking forward past corrugated metal walls and industrial scaffolding. Purple and blue neon signs illuminate the scene, including a prominent SEX SHOP sign and a Korean restaurant sign. The environment is enclosed with overhead pipes and industrial walkways visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with hotel signage and industrial fans

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight alleyway with scaffolding on the right, passing various commercial signs and industrial equipment

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese text ホテル (hotel) and vacancy indicator
large circular industrial ventilation fan mounted on the right wall
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
dense web of electrical and communication cables overhead

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow alley, the camera passes a Korean restaurant sign and approaches a large blue neon hotel sign with Japanese characters. Industrial exhaust fans and graffiti-covered walls line the path, with metal scaffolding now closer on the right. The environment remains enclosed and sheltered with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back area transitioning to open neon-lit plaza

events.description: exits narrow industrial passage into open plaza with pink and purple neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial passage with large exhaust fans, approaching an open plaza with pink neon lighting and a lone figure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an industrial passage with large exhaust fans and a yellow dumpster, transitioning into a more open plaza area illuminated by pink neon. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and a large digital billboard becomes visible. A lone figure stands in the distance near the pink-lit building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to main city street with traffic barriers

events.description: exits open plaza onto main city street with visible vehicle traffic and tall skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the main street, passing concrete barriers and large digital billboards, approaching the street exit

entered.detail: white and orange concrete traffic barriers lining the path
green neon arrow sign reading Barely Legal pointing left
asphalt city street with lane markings and traffic lights
tall buildings with multiple illuminated signs and advertisements in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the camera passes concrete barricades and approaches the exit to a main city street. A green neon sign reading Barely Legal becomes visible on the left. The scene opens up to reveal tall skyscrapers with illuminated signs in the background, transitioning from the enclosed alley to the urban street environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow restaurant alley with outdoor seating and red neon lighting

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the right side of the street
turns left off the main street into narrow alley with outdoor restaurant seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk as a taxi passes by, then turning into a narrow alley with outdoor restaurant seating and red neon signs

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the street to the right

restaurant patio with plastic chairs and tables

large green patio umbrella over outdoor seating

bright red neon sign reading LOUNGE
external air conditioning unit mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins on the main city sidewalk where a yellow taxi passes by on the right. The camera then turns left into another narrow alley featuring outdoor restaurant seating with plastic chairs and green umbrellas. Red neon signs including one for LOUNGE and KNYSHA KING illuminate the passage, with wall-mounted air conditioning units visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a wide urban plaza and finally into a narrow commercial passage. It begins by moving past corrugated metal walls and industrial scaffolding under the glow of purple and blue neon signs, including a sex shop and a Korean restaurant. As the camera pushes further, the enclosed space shifts past graffiti-covered walls and large exhaust fans before opening into a pink-lit plaza adorned with red paper lanterns and a towering digital billboard. The scene then expands toward a main city street, passing concrete barricades and a green neon sign to reveal a skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and a passing yellow taxi. Finally, the camera turns left away from the open road and into a sheltered alleyway filled with outdoor restaurant seating, green umbrellas, and red neon lounge signs.
